scenes.narration: ShiftWorksHR helps compensation teams catch below-minimum pay and manager inversions before merit week.
Export from Workday, UKG, or ADP and upload your spreadsheet. Columns are mapped automatically — no template required.
In under a minute you get cycle readiness, merit pool math for finance, budget exposure, and a prioritized review queue.
Drill into below-minimum employees with names, departments, and gap-to-minimum — plus compression and manager inversion flags.
Export a leadership-ready PDF with merit scenario, risk level, and key findings — ready for your executive review.
Try it free with your own file at shiftworkshr.com. No credit card required.
